description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named beta-release that triggers on push to the beta-release branch. The workflow has two jobs: build on windows-latest and docker on ubuntu-latest. The build job configures Git, checks out code, sets up .NET Core SDK 9.0.x, restores NuGet packages, and performs a series of build, versioning, and publishing steps. It also creates a changelog, zips the release, and uploads it. The docker job sets up Docker, logs in to Docker Hub, and builds and pushes a Docker image. Both jobs post updates to a Discord webhook.
